name: LevelMark.LevelMarkType
summary: Defines options about how the level mark is shown.

enum_values.name: NoArrowNoLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: Level mark is shown without an arrow and a leader line.

enum_values.name: ArrowWithoutLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: Level mark is shown with an arrow but without a leader line.

enum_values.name: InclinedLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: Level mark is shown with an inclined leader line but without an arrow.

enum_values.name: OrthogonalLeaderLine
enum_values.summary: Level mark is shown with an orthogonal leader line and with an arrow.
